diff: Accounts must require a quorum of at least 3 signers for Critical Actions. It must not be possible for quorum to be met with signers from a single entity (no single entity will have enough signers to meet the quorum alone, and each critical action will therefore require approval from signers from at least 2 independent entities).
Signers may be sourced from any of the following entities: Spark Asset Foundation (including legal council), Phoenix Labs, Spark Operational Executor Agent.
description: This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section A.AG1.2.2.P6.2.1.2.1.1.1 of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance adopt the following operational processes and mandate for allocating funds to offchain collateralized lending arrangements.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
